obligations.rule: Ensure `assertString` is called to validate input type.
obligations.why: The function requires the input to be a string. This is enforced by `assertString`.

obligations.rule: Handle `allow_trailing_dot` option correctly by removing trailing dots.
obligations.why: The code explicitly removes trailing dots if `allow_trailing_dot` is true.

obligations.rule: Handle `allow_wildcard` option correctly by removing wildcard prefix.
obligations.why: The code removes `*.` prefix if `allow_wildcard` is true.

obligations.rule: Ensure TLD presence when `require_tld` is true.
obligations.why: The code checks for at least two parts when `require_tld` is true.

obligations.rule: Reject numeric TLDs when `allow_numeric_tld` is false.
obligations.why: The code explicitly rejects numeric TLDs unless `allow_numeric_tld` is true.

obligations.rule: Reject TLDs with spaces when `require_tld` is true.
obligations.why: The code disallows spaces in TLDs when `require_tld` is true.

obligations.rule: Reject parts longer than 63 characters unless `ignore_max_length` is true.
obligations.why: The code enforces a maximum length of 63 characters for each part unless `ignore_max_length` is true.
The code checks that each part matches the regex `/^[a-z_1-1`

test_groups.title: Input type validation
test_groups.rationale: Ensure `assertString` is called to validate input type.

test_groups.rationale: Handle `allow_trailing_dot` option correctly by removing trailing dots.

test_groups.title: Wildcard prefix handling
test_groups.rationale: Handle `allow_wildcard` option correctly by removing wildcard prefix.

test_groups.title: TLD presence enforcement
test_groups.rationale: Ensure TLD presence when `require_tld` is true.

test_groups.title: Numeric TLD rejection
test_groups.rationale: Reject numeric TLDs when `allow_numeric_tld` is false.

test_groups.title: Space in TLD rejection
test_groups.rationale: Reject TLDs with spaces when `require_tld` is true.

test_groups.title: Part length enforcement
test_groups.rationale: Reject parts longer than 63 characters unless `ignore_max_length` is true.
